description: Brian teaches React without any frills: just you, some JavaScript, and the browser. No build step.
Git is a critical part of any JS project and Brian makes sure you have it set up.
JSX is an essential part of writing React. Brian teaches you to leverage your newfound React knowledge and make it much easier to read with JSX
React manages view state through a mechanism called hooks. Brian teaches you how to use them as you build components.
useEffect is a critical hook for React, allowing developers to do asynchronous actions like making HTTP requests
An essential tool in any React developer's toolbox is the official React Dev Tools extension. Brian shows you how to install and use them.
